name: Getting Caught Off-Guard By Taihou and Roon
description:
"We can keep your little secret… if you let us show you a good time.”

After being caught peeking at your shipgirls, Taihou and Roon gang up on you and give you a choice. Either you come with them and let them show you a good time or they will let the other's know what a naughty commander they have...
